bliki_metadata.title: Neal Frazier
bliki_metadata.description: I build lightning-fast websites that help Virginia Beach specialty businesses get found on Google and get booked by customers.
bliki_metadata.author: Neal Frazier

proof_banner.headline: 100 websites. 30 days. All on Netlify.
proof_banner.description: I built 100 production websites in 30 days to master my craft and build a reusable component library. That library now powers every site I deliver to clients.

process_steps.title: We Talk
process_steps.description: I learn what makes your business special and what your customers need.

process_steps.title: I Build
process_steps.description: Fast, SEO-optimized website with booking built in. Ready in days, not months.

process_steps.title: You Grow
process_steps.description: Customers find you on Google, book instantly, and keep coming back.

faq.question: How long does it take to build my website?
faq.answer: Most VB Specialty Launchpad sites are live within 1-2 weeks. Because I've built 100+ sites, I have a proven component library that accelerates delivery without sacrificing quality.

faq.question: Do I need to provide content and images?
faq.answer: I'll guide you through exactly what's needed. Most clients provide their business info and photos, and I handle the rest — copywriting, layout, and optimization.

faq.question: Will my site actually rank on Google?
faq.answer: Every site includes local SEO setup: Google Business Profile optimization, schema markup, and fast Netlify edge-delivery. These are the fundamentals that move the needle for local search.

faq.question: What about booking and scheduling?
faq.answer: Integrated booking is a core feature. I use serverless functions to connect your site with scheduling tools, so customers can book directly — no friction, no phone tag.

faq.question: What if I need changes after launch?
faq.answer: Your site is built on modern, maintainable technology. I offer ongoing support and can make updates quickly. You're not locked into a rigid template.

posts.title: Why I Built 100 Websites in 30 Days (And Hosted Them on Netlify)
posts.content_summary: A deep dive into the 100 Websites project. Discussing the CI/CD pipeline, overcoming builder fatigue, and why Netlify is my go-to for Jamstack.

posts.title: Solving the 'Get Booked' Problem for VB Specialty Shops
posts.content_summary: Many specialty businesses in Virginia Beach have great services but terrible booking flows. Here is how I use Netlify Serverless Functions to integrate seamless scheduling.

posts.title: My Journey to Becoming a Certified Netlify Partner
posts.content_summary: Announcing my intention to become a Certified Netlify Partner to bring enterprise-grade web speeds to Hampton Roads businesses.
